messages.content:
My mobile phone is__________than yours.

a.
the expensivest

b.
the most expensive

c.
more expensive

d.
expensiver
c. more expensive

Cars drive on the__________, pedestrians walk on the__________.

a.
street / road

b.
path / street

c.
street / pavement

d.
pavement / path
c. street / pavement

The teacher told us to listen to him____________

a.
carefully

b.
careful

c.
good

d.
quite
a. carefully

Would you like some______________?

a.
cup of tea

b.
coffee

c.
sandwich

d.
glass of juice
a. cup of tea

We can buy a screwdriver in a___________

a.
chemist's

b.
bakery

c.
hardware shop

d.
stationer's
c. hardware shop

Hi mum. I'm__________my way home.I will be at home___________8 o'clock.

a.
near/in

b.
at/on

c.
on/at

d.
in/on
d. in/on

My parents live in a__________in the countryside.

a.
roundabout

b.
cottage

c.
town hall

d.
square
b. cottage

Ant isn't__________land animal in the world.

a.
smaller

b.
the smallest

c.
the most small

d.
small
b. the smallest

Who________she________last week?

a.
does/interviews

b.
did/interview

c.
is/interview

d.
did/interviewed
b. did/interview

You play golf very____________

a.
well

b.
good

c.
bad

d.
goodly
a. well

Where is your brother? B: He is__________school,__________his class.

a.
in/at

b.
at/in

c.
at/at

d.
on/in
b. at/in
